transcript.text:
Hey! Tzuyang is here so do your best!
*Home-cooked meal
How is it this savory?
This is the best recipe
You need to work now!
My back hurts
*Place full of happiness Gimje, South Korea
Hello everyone
It's my very first time visiting Gimje
They say that this city has the highest rice production rate
But that has been decreased substantially due to COVID19
The farmers are also having a hard time during this time of crisis
So that's why I'm here today!
*North Jeolla Province, City of Gimje *This was filmed as safely as possible with the usage of hand-sanitizers and heat sensors
Tzuyang is here!
Hello~ nice to meet you

She is so pretty
Rumor has it that you can eat 16 packs of ramyun noodles
Forreals!?
Really?
*Scared
Like actually?
You eat that much and you're that skinny? You don't even have a belly
Yes, we are struggling
There are no people here
No one comes here anymore
We can't do field work together
That's why it's hard
The scenery is great here Let's eat upstairs
*Tzuyang's first rooftop mukbang
*Where you can see the horizon
It's been a long time since I had a meal on a rooftop

Chuck Flap, Short Plate, Top Blade, Sirloin
They prepared this for me to get fueled up for labor
Gimje is known for their "Horizon Beef"
And also their "Horizon Rice" (Brand names)
Bon Appetit!
I really didn't think the rumor was true
1 piece is ready to eat This is why I love beef
I like to eat it rare, so I'll try this one
This looks delicious
It's so savory
Tzuyang!
We made this with our Horizon Rice
It's Rice Wine
It's delicious So good
It's our famous rice
I don't enjoy drinking rice wine that much

But this is amazing
This is Glasswort Salt
Ham Cho Salt!
Thank you
Here we have the Short Plate Yum~
Let's cut up the sirloin
I want big bites
I've always cooked pork on the rooftop, but never beef
*Go away
Kimchi tastes so good I want to take some home
Yummy
The taste is just like a 2 Plus Grade beef
But the texture is really nice
It's very chewy
Top it off with some kimchi
Wrap it

This can't possible go wrong
It's so good
*Fly Go away!
Hey!
Tzuyang is here so do your best
She is one good chef You'll be amazed at her cooking
Her steamed egg is... Hey make it in that bowl
She makes the best steamed egg
You'll flip backwards if you eat this
This truly is the best
*Was that the secret ingredient?
You guys are all dead
Try this
Leek Kimchi
I heard you don't like veggies
Eat a lot while you're here

All for you
That looks delicious
Steamed egg
Tada~
Thank you
Thank you for the food
That visual though I'll try it
Even the rice by itself is delicious
Tasty
Just like how my grandmother used to make
Really
It's good It's nutty
*Puts it aside
Good
Is this Kimchi stew? Does it have soybean?
No soybean

*Brainwash
It's just kimchi, water, and some anchovies
It's full of calcium!
Why am I tasting soybean?
It's probably the Perilla powder
Oh, you're right
Tzuyang
Eat a lot of kimchi too
Kimchi tastes so good
Thank you~
*Tzuyang - A child who listens well
I had it before It's so good
Everything here is so delicious
The moms over there are even better than me
Who made the leek kimchi?
Mommy did

Really?
Yes, it's me! It's so good
*Let's see if the other moms did well
It's good
You are the best at this
Let's cut up some meat
With the leek kimchi
Wrap it up
Looks yummy
It's just rice, but the rice is so good
That's so strange
*She doesn't like rice that much
I thought to myself: "How delicious can a rice be? It's just rice"
But it's really good
Eating the rice by itself is just really satisfying
Was I brainwashed because they kept saying it's good?

Really yummy
It's like...
When you are just having a regular meal and say "hey, the rice is yummy"
It's like that right now
Sushi
Beef, Kimchi sushi
I don't know how to explain
*I'll just eat
It's really good
I've been only eating delivery food lately
Eating home-cooked meal like this is amazing
I want to thank the moms that cooked this delicious meal
It was very unexpected and it was amazing
The city's specialty (rice and beef) were very delicious
Now that I'm filled up with energy, I'll head out to do some labor
Thank you for the food~

Thank you for the meal
Did you enjoy it?
Thank you for enjoying it
Now go do some work!
Go change into work clothes!
*Center of rice harvesting: Gimje
*Tzuyang is here to lend a small help to the farmers
They are already planting
You have to work hard!
*This is all rice
*Fashionista
*Learning new things
*1st round of planting
You just need to hand-plant the seeds where the machine didn't get to
Sumjin River's clear water, clean loam, and perfect climate Cultivated under these natural conditions is the reason why Gimje rice is the best
It was easier to eat the rice I will not leave leftovers from now on

My back hurts
Gimje's Horizon Rice has its own stickiness and quality and has a unique taste
*Horizon Rice's rice wine
*Rice wine after labor
Welcome Tzuyang
*Rice wine from the country side
This is tasty
*Baby bird snacking
Everything here is made with Gimje rice
Rice wine, rice cake, sweet rice dessert
The chili pepper is good too
All the moms planted and harvested them
Dip it
Yummy
It's good The rice cake is good right?
Good rice makes everything chewy and delicious

I won't give you anymore even if you compliment it
No more?
I don't really eat the sweet rice dessert either
Why!?
I don't usually eat it
But this is great The moms made this?
Let's not attend today's meeting
*Let's turn up
Look how she's sitting down
*Country Swag
She's the real deal Even we don't even sit like that
Come again Tzuyang
You must be exhausted
No, thank you for inviting me here
I ate a lot of good food
Please come see the moms again soon

Call the city hall before you come
They made some really delicious food so I had a great time
Thanks everyone~
This place is called Byeokgoljae, I'll head inside
That's huge!
Double dragon
Scorched rice
This is the famous Horizon Rice
I want some crunchy rice
*Come visit Gimje!
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
